method_card.parent_question: How can chunked/source-span LLM methods preserve source grounding while still supporting useful abstraction?
intended_inputs: the same approved source excerpt used by long_context_judgment_live_pilot_001
chunked source segments with explicit span support expectations
DeepSeek V4 Pro with thinking disabled
pre-recorded prompt and model configuration metadata
known_risks: This is a proposed live LLM pilot planning record, not a completed run.
Flash pilot 001 failed structurally because output truncated, JSON was incomplete, and output_contract_too_large was recorded.
DeepSeek V4 Pro and a smaller output contract may still fail to produce complete parseable output.
Chunking may preserve source spans while losing broader trader intent.
Prompt or trace handling may accidentally include raw source material if the privacy boundary is not followed.
non_goals: not a replacement for the Flash pilot 001 negative record
